CustomField.formula:
IF(leaseworks__Type__c == 'MI', HYPERLINK('/' & leaseworks__Market_Intelligence__c, leaseworks__Market_Intelligence__r.Name + ' - Remarket' , '_blank'), IF(leaseworks__Type__c == 'AIT', HYPERLINK('/' & leaseworks__Aircraft_In_Transaction__c, leaseworks__Aircraft_In_Transaction__r.Name + ' - Acquisition', '_blank'),
IF(leaseworks__Type__c == 'IL', HYPERLINK("/" & leaseworks__Interaction_Log__r.Id , leaseworks__Interaction_Log__r.Name ), null)) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Reference to the matching Market Intel or Aircraft in Transaction.
CustomField.label: Reference
